identity.title: Identity
identity.slugHint: The URL segment in your public site. Changing this breaks existing links.
identity.descriptionPlaceholder: Short tagline + the gist of the place.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Logo and cover image shown on the public site.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: How customers reach you and where receipts come from.

location.title: Location
location.description: Coordinates power the customer map, delivery-zone checks, and search results.
location.prompt: Click the map or use Locate me to set a location.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: Shapes how the restaurant appears in search results, AI answers, and social previews.
discovery.cuisineHint: Comma-separated, e.g. "Polish, Middle Eastern". Drives schema.org servesCuisine.
discovery.priceRangeHint: Used by Google rich results and map cards.
discovery.sameAsHint: One URL per line — Facebook, Instagram, Google Business, etc. Emitted as schema.org sameAs.

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Per-channel acceptance — gates the public site without unpublishing the restaurant.
channels.publishedHint: Show on the customer site at all.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Unpublishing hides the restaurant from the public site immediately.
danger.unpublishHint: Equivalent to flipping the Published switch off
